testcase.name: test_mfa_setup_returns_totp_secret

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing 'secret' in response assert 'secret' in {'mfa_enabled': False, 'success': True, 'user_id': 'user_001'}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration44_security_compliance.py:36: in test_mfa_setup_returns_totp_secret assert "secret" in data, "Missing 'secret' in response" E AssertionError: Missing 'secret' in response E assert 'secret' in {'mfa_enabled': False, 'success': True, 'user_id': 'user_001'}

testcase.name: test_audit_log_event
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration44_security_compliance.py:174: in test_audit_log_event assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_scenario_presets_returns_templates
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration44_security_compliance.py:255: in test_scenario_presets_returns_templates assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_scenario_compare
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration44_security_compliance.py:300: in test_scenario_compare assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
